title: California Vehicle Title Transfer and Replacement (Form REG 227)
description: Transfer a vehicle's Certificate of Title from a seller to a new owner, and/or obtain a replacement title, using the data model of DMV Form REG 227 (Application for Replacement or Transfer of Title). REG 227 is used whenever the original paper title is unavailable to complete the transfer by endorsing its back (lost, stolen, illegible/mutilated, or never received from the prior owner or from DMV). It covers two paths selected by transactionType: a pure replacement-title request (the current owner only), or a transfer of title with replacement (the seller releases ownership and the new owner registers). This document models the individual-to-individual case: the registered/new owner sections (0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 7). Out of scope: the notarized legal-owner (lienholder) lien-release path (form Section 5, which cannot be used for non-ELT participants with vehicles 2 model years old or newer), the dealer's-release path (Section 8), vessels and vessel-specific fields (hull identification number, CF number, vessel-mooring location), and the Statement of Facts (REG 256) required for a qualified-relative transfer's use-tax exemption. It does not submit the application; the live California DMV source is always authoritative (see VERIFICATION.md).

verification.notes: Source-derived reference schema transcribed field-by-field from the live Form REG 227 (Rev. 9/2021) PDF at dmv.ca.gov (fetched directly; no CDN block encountered, unlike the bpd.cdn.sos.ca.gov forms used for the sibling LLC-1/ARTS-GS documents). Cross-checked against the DMV Vehicle Industry Registration Procedures Manual chapter on Form REG 227 (dmv.ca.gov/portal/handbook) for the sections/paths this form serves. Not a time-versioned/edition form: a title transfer is a one-time event per transaction, not filed 'for' a recurring period, so it is authored at the plain (non-edition) registry path per the GSP-0005 §2 coexistence test. Status remains 'draft' pending full independent field-by-field source review. See VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: transactionType
fields.label: Type of transaction
fields.description: replacement_only = Replacement Title (complete sections/fields for the current owner only). transfer_with_replacement = Transfer of Title with Replacement (the seller releases ownership and the new owner registers; complete transfer within 10 days of taking possession of the vehicle). Determines which of the newOwner*/releasingOwner* fields below are required.

fields.name: licensePlateNumber
fields.label: Vehicle license plate number
fields.description: The vessel CF number field on the same line is out of scope; this document covers vehicles only.

fields.name: vehicleIdentificationNumber
fields.label: Vehicle identification number (VIN)
fields.description: The hull identification number field on the same line (for vessels) is out of scope.

fields.name: vehicleYearAndMake
fields.label: Year/make of vehicle
fields.description: Free text as printed on the form's single combined blank, e.g. "2019 Honda". The vessel-builder alternative on the same line is out of scope.

fields.name: registeredOwnerName
fields.label: Registered owner's true full name, business name, or lessor
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Print name as it appears on the Title/Registration: last, first, middle, suffix (or a business name/lessor).

fields.name: registeredOwnerLicenseNumber
fields.label: Registered owner's driver license/ID card number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data.

fields.name: registeredOwnerLicenseState
fields.label: Registered owner's driver license/ID card — issuing state
fields.description: Two-letter USPS state abbreviation.

fields.name: coOwnerName
fields.label: Co-owner's true full name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Only if the vehicle has a co-owner of record.

fields.name: coOwnerLicenseNumber
fields.label: Co-owner's driver license/ID card number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when coOwnerName is given.

fields.name: coOwnerLicenseState
fields.label: Co-owner's driver license/ID card — issuing state
fields.description: Required when coOwnerName is given. Two-letter USPS state abbreviation.

fields.name: ownerPhysicalAddressLine1
fields.label: Owner's physical residence or business address
fields.description: Include street, avenue, etc., and apartment/space/suite number.

fields.name: ownerPhysicalAddressCity
fields.label: Owner's physical address — city
fields.description: The city of the owner's physical residence or business address.

fields.name: ownerPhysicalAddressState
fields.label: Owner's physical address — state
fields.description: Two-letter USPS state abbreviation.

fields.name: ownerPhysicalAddressZipCode
fields.label: Owner's physical address — ZIP code
fields.description: 5-digit or ZIP+4 U.S. format, e.g. 95814 or 95814-1234.

fields.name: ownerCountyOfResidence
fields.label: County of residence or county where the vehicle is principally garaged
fields.description: A single California county name.

fields.name: ownerMailingAddressLine1
fields.label: Owner's mailing address, if different from the physical address
fields.description: Optional; used for mailing purposes only.

fields.name: ownerMailingAddressCity
fields.label: Owner's mailing address — city
fields.description: Required when ownerMailingAddressLine1 is given.

fields.name: ownerMailingAddressState
fields.label: Owner's mailing address — state
fields.description: Required when ownerMailingAddressLine1 is given. Two-letter USPS state abbreviation.

fields.name: ownerMailingAddressZipCode
fields.label: Owner's mailing address — ZIP code
fields.description: Required when ownerMailingAddressLine1 is given.

fields.name: existingLienholderName
fields.label: Name of bank, finance company, or individual having a lien on this vehicle
fields.description: Leave unset if there is no existing lien. Do not enter the name(s) of the registered owner(s) here.

fields.name: existingLienholderAddressLine1
fields.label: Existing lienholder's business or residence address
fields.description: Required when existingLienholderName is given.

fields.name: existingLienholderAddressCity
fields.label: Existing lienholder's address — city
fields.description: Required when existingLienholderName is given.

fields.name: existingLienholderAddressState
fields.label: Existing lienholder's address — state
fields.description: Required when existingLienholderName is given. Two-letter USPS state abbreviation.

fields.name: existingLienholderAddressZipCode
fields.label: Existing lienholder's address — ZIP code
fields.description: Required when existingLienholderName is given.

fields.name: missingTitleReason
fields.label: The Certificate of Title issued for this vehicle is
fields.description: Check one box. illegible_mutilated requires attaching the old title. not_received_from_dmv allows 30 days from the issue date before applying. WARNING: issuance of a replacement title cancels the original title. If the address on file differs from DMV's records, the application must be filed in person with proof of ownership and identification, and a CHP vehicle verification is required if the title was replaced within the last 90 days.

fields.name: ownerCertificationName
fields.label: Printed name of owner (missing-title certification)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. The owner certifies, under penalty of perjury under California law, that the missing-title statement is true and correct, and agrees to indemnify the Director of Motor Vehicles for any loss from issuing the replacement title.

fields.name: ownerCertificationDate
fields.label: Date of owner's missing-title certification
fields.description: YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: ownerCertificationPhone
fields.label: Owner's daytime telephone number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. In international E.164 format, e.g. +19165551234.

fields.name: releasingOwnerName
fields.label: Printed name of releasing owner (release of ownership)
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when transactionType is transfer_with_replacement. The registered owner releases interest in the vehicle. If co-owners are joined by "AND" on DMV records, each co-owner must separately sign/release (out of scope for this flat single-signer field; see GSP-0009). A company/business signer's printed name must include the business name and an authorized representative's countersignature, e.g. "ABC CO., by JOHN SMITH".

fields.name: releasingOwnerDate
fields.label: Date of releasing owner's signature
fields.description: Required when transactionType is transfer_with_replacement. YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: releasingOwnerPhone
fields.label: Releasing owner's daytime telephone number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when transactionType is transfer_with_replacement. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: acquisitionDate
fields.label: Date purchased or acquired
fields.description: Required when transactionType is transfer_with_replacement. YYYY-MM-DD.

fields.name: acquisitionType
fields.label: How the vehicle was acquired
fields.description: Required when transactionType is transfer_with_replacement. If purchase, give purchasePrice. If gift or trade, give marketValue instead. If acquired from a qualifying relative (parent/child, grandparent/grandchild, spouse, domestic partner, or minor sibling related by blood or adoption), a separate Statement of Facts (REG 256) for the use-tax exemption must also be submitted — out of scope for this document.

fields.name: purchasePrice
fields.label: Purchase price
fields.description: Required when acquisitionType is purchase. U.S. dollars.

fields.name: marketValue
fields.label: Market value
fields.description: Required when acquisitionType is gift or trade. U.S. dollars.

fields.name: newOwnerName
fields.label: New owner's true full name, business name, or lessor
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when transactionType is transfer_with_replacement. Print true full name as shown on driver license/ID card: last, first, middle, suffix (or a business name/lessor).

fields.name: newOwnerLicenseNumber
fields.label: New owner's driver license/ID card number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when transactionType is transfer_with_replacement.

fields.name: newOwnerLicenseState
fields.label: New owner's driver license/ID card — issuing state
fields.description: Required when transactionType is transfer_with_replacement. Two-letter USPS state abbreviation.

fields.name: newCoOwnerName
fields.label: New co-owner's or lessee's true full name
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Only if the new registration will have a co-owner or lessee. If given, also give newCoOwnershipType.

fields.name: newCoOwnershipType
fields.label: Co-owner joinder — AND or OR
fields.description: Required when newCoOwnerName is given. Co-owners joined by "and" each require their own signature to later sell, gift, or transfer the vehicle; co-owners joined by "or" require only one owner's signature.

fields.name: newOwnerPhysicalAddressLine1
fields.label: New owner's physical residence or business address
fields.description: Required when transactionType is transfer_with_replacement.

fields.name: newOwnerPhysicalAddressCity
fields.label: New owner's physical address — city
fields.description: Required when transactionType is transfer_with_replacement.

fields.name: newOwnerPhysicalAddressState
fields.label: New owner's physical address — state
fields.description: Required when transactionType is transfer_with_replacement. Two-letter USPS state abbreviation.

fields.name: newOwnerPhysicalAddressZipCode
fields.label: New owner's physical address — ZIP code
fields.description: Required when transactionType is transfer_with_replacement.

fields.name: newOwnerCountyOfResidence
fields.label: New owner's county of residence or county where the vehicle is principally garaged
fields.description: Required when transactionType is transfer_with_replacement.

fields.name: newOwnerMailingAddressLine1
fields.label: New owner's mailing address, if different from the physical address
fields.description: Optional; used for mailing purposes only.

fields.name: newOwnerMailingAddressCity
fields.label: New owner's mailing address — city
fields.description: Required when newOwnerMailingAddressLine1 is given.

fields.name: newOwnerMailingAddressState
fields.label: New owner's mailing address — state
fields.description: Required when newOwnerMailingAddressLine1 is given. Two-letter USPS state abbreviation.

fields.name: newOwnerMailingAddressZipCode
fields.label: New owner's mailing address — ZIP code
fields.description: Required when newOwnerMailingAddressLine1 is given.

fields.name: newOwnerCertificationDate
fields.label: Date of new owner's signature
fields.description: Required when transactionType is transfer_with_replacement. The new owner certifies, under penalty of perjury under California law, that the mailing address is valid and existing, and consents to service of process at that address per Vehicle Code section 1808.21.

fields.name: newOwnerPhone
fields.label: New owner's daytime telephone number
fields.description: Personal identifier; handle as sensitive data. Required when transactionType is transfer_with_replacement. In international E.164 format.

fields.name: newLienholderName
fields.label: New legal owner (lienholder) — true full name of bank, finance company, or individual
fields.description: Required when transactionType is transfer_with_replacement; the form instructs writing "None" if there is no new lienholder. Do not re-enter the name of the new registered owner(s) here.

fields.name: newLienholderAddressLine1
fields.label: New lienholder's physical residence or business address
fields.description: Required when newLienholderName is given and is not "None".

fields.name: newLienholderAddressCity
fields.label: New lienholder's address — city
fields.description: Required when newLienholderName is given and is not "None".

fields.name: newLienholderAddressState
fields.label: New lienholder's address — state
fields.description: Required when newLienholderName is given and is not "None". Two-letter USPS state abbreviation.

fields.name: newLienholderAddressZipCode
fields.label: New lienholder's address — ZIP code
fields.description: Required when newLienholderName is given and is not "None".

steps.title: Registered owner's release of ownership (transfer only)
